title: PRP and Physiotherapy for Disc Herniation
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"6962o","text":"This protocol outlines a randomized controlled trial (RCT) to evaluate the effectiveness of ultrasound-guided platelet-rich plasma (PRP) injections combined with McKenzie exercises compared to McKenzie exercises alone in 60 patients with L5/S1 lumbar disc herniation (LDH), assessing pain, disc morphology, neurophysiology, and disability over 6 months. The intervention involves a single PRP injection (2–3 ml autologous PRP) plus a 4-week McKenzie exercise program, with outcomes measured using musculoskeletal ultrasound (MSK-USG), nerve conduction studies (NCS), electromyography (EMG), Visual Analogue Scale (VAS), Pressure Pain Thresholds (PPTs), Straight Leg Raise (SLR) test, and Oswestry Disability Index (ODI). The study is expected to demonstrate that combining PRP with McKenzie exercises significantly improves disc morphology, neurophysiological recovery, pain, and disability compared to exercises alone. Results may inform evidence-based treatment strategies for LDH in resource-limited settings.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"e7vqu","text":"Guidelines for Protocol Execution","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"14q6n","text":"To ensure precise execution of the randomized controlled trial (RCT) evaluating ultrasound-guided platelet-rich plasma (PRP) injections combined with McKenzie exercises for L5/S1 lumbar disc herniation, the following guidelines must be followed:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ad15s","text":"Study Oversight: Conduct the single-center RCT at Jashore University of Science and Technology, with randomization using a computer-generated sequence and allocation concealment via sealed envelopes.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":15}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bj70m","text":"Blinding: Ensure outcome assessors are blinded to group allocation; participants and clinicians cannot be fully blinded due to PRP injection.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2u9m2","text":"Training: Require certified training for Orthopedic Spine Surgeons (PRP injections), Certified McKenzie Therapists (exercises), and assessors (MSK-USG, NCS, EMG).","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2tk1o","text":"Participant Screening: Verify eligibility using NASS guidelines, including MRI-confirmed L5/S1 LDH, chronic symptoms (\u003e6 weeks, VAS ≥3), and normal platelet count (150–400 × 10^9/L).","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":21}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"28cfg","text":"Intervention Delivery:\n","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":21}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"avc1b","text":"Control Group: Deliver 4-week McKenzie exercise program (12 clinic sessions, 5–7 minutes, 10 repetitions; home program 5–7 sessions daily).","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":1,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"41g6j","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5ast3","text":"Experimental Group: Administer single ultrasound-guided PRP injection (4 ml, 3 ml PRP + 0.5 ml saline) plus identical McKenzie exercises.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":1,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3j994","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9bd3l","text":"Outcome Assessments: Measure pain (VAS, PPTs), disc morphology (MSK-USG), neurophysiology (SLR, NCS, EMG), and disability (ODI) at baseline, 1, 3, and 6 months by blinded assessors.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":19}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bd23i","text":"Data Management: Collect data using structured forms, store anonymized data in a password-protected database, and conduct weekly audits for accuracy.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":15}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"6g61e","text":"1. PRP Injection","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6ddio","text":"Blood Collection: 26 ml syringes, CPDA tubes (24 ml, 6–8 per participant), 21-gauge butterfly needles, alcohol swabs, sterile gloves, tourniquets.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":16}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"211ou","text":"PRP Preparation: Centrifuge (900–1000 g), 15 ml conical tubes, 5 ml pipettes, normal saline (10 ml vials).","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":15}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dfgbp","text":"Injection: 22-gauge, 8-inch Quincke Chiba needles, 5 ml syringes, ultrasound gel, sterile drapes, povidone-iodine, adhesive bandages.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":9}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3i9of","text":"2. McKenzie Exercises","type":"header-three","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5a2mv","text":"Equipment: Treatment plinths, floor mats, pillows/bolsters.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":9}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4fgea","text":"Instructional: Printed exercise guides (English/Bengali), home exercise diaries.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":13}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1e7k2","text":"Monitoring: Timer, attendance log sheets.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":10}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dnbof","text":"3. Outcome Assessments","type":"header-three","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"52nj7","text":"Pain: Visual Analog Scale (VAS) forms, pressure algometer.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":4}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"d4moi","text":"Disc Morphology: Musculoskeletal ultrasound, ultrasound gel, cleaning wipes.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":15}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fld1a","text":"Neurophysiology: NCS/EMG system , surface electrodes, conductive gel, goniometer (for SLR test).","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":15}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7okca","text":"Disability: Oswestry Disability Index (ODI) questionnaires (English/Bengali).","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":10}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7s557","text":"4. Data Management","type":"header-three","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fpmg3","text":"Forms: Data collection forms (VAS, PPTs, MSK-USG, NCS, EMG, SLR, ODI), adverse event forms.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":5}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"99les","text":"Storage: Computer with database software, external hard drive/secure cloud, secure filing cabinet.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":7}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"48dts","text":"5. Safety/Emergency","type":"header-three","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"n9nh","text":"Sharps container, first aid kit, resuscitation kit, hand sanitizers, disinfectants, emergency contact list.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a7emj","text":"6. Participant Materials","type":"header-three","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cn97u","text":"Consent forms and study information sheets (English/Bengali).","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Rayhan Islam
